subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. According to the clear text of the Book of Akdas... ...According to the text of the Book of Akdas and the explicit Book of Ahd, Abdu'l-Baha is the interpreter
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید بنص کتاب اقدس و صریح کتاب عهد عبدالبهاء مبین
subcodes.subjects: @importance of authoritative interpretation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
